title: Create item with checkbox checked

posts.author: NicoMutert (Nico Mutert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey guys,

is it possible to set the standard value (for creating) an item to “checkbox XY checked” so that if I create this new item, the checkbox is already marked as checked?

Somehow it doesn’t work for me (I tried it on multiple boards).

Thanks for your help!
Nico

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: The item defaults values popup allows you te set the checkbox to checked however when I tested that the checkbox is not checked for new items. Looks like a bug to me.

posts.author: NicoMutert (Nico Mutert)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yeah exactly. I had the same experience. Normally it should work I guess. Hopefully the support team can fix this one.

Thanks for your reply!

posts.author: NicoMutert (Nico Mutert)
posts.cookedHtml: @Matias.Monday is this something to hand forward to the support team?
